name: Easy Lasagna Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the noodles until tender; drain.
2. Cook ground beef and onion in a skillet until browned. Drain fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce and spaghetti sauce mix. Cook until thickened.
4. Combine cream cheese and evaporated milk in a saucepan and cook on low heat until smooth.
5. Stir in garlic salt, noodles, and the cooked mixture into a greased 9-inch square baking dish.
6. Spread meat mixture over the noodles.
7. Top with Mozzarella cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until bubbly.
